summary: Plan-mode inventory classification only. The hydrated preflight artifact identifies this as a PR inventory shard with no shared canonical, no security-sensitive hydrated items, no merge/fix permission, low-signal closeout disabled, and no allowed GitHub mutation in plan mode. Each hydrated open PR is kept as an independent maintainer review item; missing hydrated refs are not given mutating actions.

actions.reason: Independent open maintainer-owned PR; no duplicate/supersession evidence in this inventory shard.
Independent ready-for-review PR; no closure or merge action is allowed or fully preflighted.
Independent open PR awaiting author/maintainer follow-up; no duplicate or low-signal close evidence.
Independent PR with maintainer/proof and bot-review follow-up still required; not a closure candidate.
Non-mutating inventory classification only; missing hydrated updated_at blocks any close/comment/label recommendation.
Non-mutating inventory classification only; no hydrated state to support closure or merge.

Draft independent PR; no low-signal closure permission and no merge permission.
Independent draft PR; no duplicate, supersession, or closure evidence.

Independent draft PR; merge is blocked by draft status and job frontmatter, but classification is clear.

Independent draft PR with conflicts/dirty merge state; no closure basis and merge is blocked.

Independent draft PR with current maintainer-review label; no closure evidence.
Independent draft PR; security-shaped check names do not override artifact security clearance, and no mutation is allowed.
Independent draft PR; no duplicate/supersession evidence and no low-signal closure permission.
Independent dependent draft PR in a multi-PR sequence; needs maintainer/path sequencing rather than cleanup closure.
Independent contributor PR with useful code but failing checks/proof label; keep for maintainer review rather than close.
Independent SDK compatibility refactor needing proof/maintainer review; no shared canonical or cleanup action.
